Premise :

Your crush got absolutely violated by gigachad mike and now she's his girlfreind... She probably didn't even know you so uhh... Who gives a fuck about that slut ?.. after being sad for a few days and realizing how much of red flag that bitch was.. you decided to look for someone else.. someone that would accept your lonely ass..

And you found.. her.. Lucy..

But something made you confused af... Why wasn't she taken ?.. she was cute AF, got perky titties and a bubble butt... So it made you confused on how such a beautiful girl could be single..

But aye.. game is game.. you went up to her.. and uhh.. you confessed.. to which she replied..

"Woahh.. you have feelings for me ?... Well.. I don't.. what is love ?"

(Baby don't hurt me)

You though that was straight up rejection.. but your ass decided to continue and voila.. you got it..

"You want to be my boyfreind/girlfriend ?... What is that ?"

And that's how your relationship started..

And you learned.. the reason why she was single wasn't because anybody didn't want her... It was because she was.. quite.. unique.. with a fuck ton of problems that are directly placed on yo ass if you decide to become her boyfreind (or girlfreind).
